name: Avocado Gazpacho Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut one cucumber into chunks and process with 2 cups of the broth, cilantro, lime juice, salt, and Tabasco.
2. Pit, peel, and chop the avocados. Process with the pureed mixture and add the third cup of broth.
3. Process briefly to coarsely puree the avocado, leaving some chunks. Chill at least 2 hours.
4. Just before serving, dice the green onions. Peel, seed, and chop the second cucumber.
5. Pour soup into bowls and garnish each with a few croutons and fresh cilantro sprigs. Offer the minced onion and diced cucumber on the side to add individually.
